% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for neg.tptp
1. french != spanish & french != german & french != basque & spanish != german & spanish != basque & german != basque [input(axiom)]
3. romance(spanish) [input(axiom)]
6. ! [X0,X1] : ((romance(X1) & romance(X0)) => related(X0,X1)) [input(axiom)]
7. ! [X0] : (X0 != basque => ~related(basque,X0)) [input(axiom)]
8. ~romance(basque) [input(conjecture)]
9. ~~romance(basque) [negated conjecture 8]
10. romance(basque) [flattening 9]
12. ! [X0,X1] : (related(X0,X1) | (~romance(X1) | ~romance(X0))) [ennf transformation 6]
13. ! [X0,X1] : (related(X0,X1) | ~romance(X1) | ~romance(X0)) [flattening 12]
14. ! [X0] : (~related(basque,X0) | basque = X0) [ennf transformation 7]
16. spanish != basque [cnf transformation 1]
22. romance(spanish) [cnf transformation 3]
25. related(X0,X1) | ~romance(X1) | ~romance(X0) [cnf transformation 13]
26. ~related(basque,X0) | basque = X0 [cnf transformation 14]
27. romance(basque) [cnf transformation 10]
31. ~romance(X0) | ~romance(basque) | basque = X0 [resolution 25,26]
32. ~romance(X0) | basque = X0 [forward subsumption resolution 31,27]
35. spanish = basque [resolution 32,22]
36. $false [forward subsumption resolution 35,16]
% SZS output end Proof for neg.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
